# truenas_dataset (Data Source)

Provides information about a ZFS dataset on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_dataset" "tank" {
  id = "tank"
}

output "dataset_used" {
  value = data.truenas_dataset.tank.used
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The full dataset path (e.g., tank/mydata).

### Read-Only

- `atime` (String) Access time setting.
- `comments` (String) Dataset comments.
- `compression` (String) The compression algorithm.
- `deduplication` (String) Deduplication setting.
- `mount_point` (String) The mount point.
- `name` (String) The dataset name.
- `pool` (String) The pool the dataset belongs to.
- `quota` (Number) Dataset quota in bytes.
- `readonly` (String) Read-only setting.
- `record_size` (String) Record size.
- `refquota` (Number) Dataset reference quota in bytes.
- `sync` (String) Sync write behavior.
- `type` (String) The dataset type (FILESYSTEM or VOLUME).
